calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Feb-01-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: All Parties sworn prior to commencement of the proceeding.

Appearances: Arati Vasan (Asian Pacific Islander Legal Outreach) for and with Antonia Frazier (Petitioner). Gloria Wong, Socail Worker from Adult Protective Services and Kamala Duplessis, Provider from Golden Gate Reginal Center are also present.

Respondent Shanae Seastruck was not present. The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, the Petitioner qualified as a Dependent Adult and the Court will grant a protective order with respect to Antonia Frazier. Petitioner's order is Granted as follows: Respondent shall stay at least 100 yards away from the protected person and the home.

Respondent shall not Physically Abuse, Financially Abuse, Intimidate, Molest, Attack, Assault (sexually or otherwise), Hit, Follow, Stalk, Threaten, Harass, Destroy Personal Property, Keep under Surveillance, or Block Movements, Contact (directly or indirectly), Telephone, Send Messages, Mail or e-Mail, Take Any Action, Directly or Through Others, to Obtain the Addresses or Locations of the Protected Person. The Stay Away Order does not include a vehicle or a workplace.

No Guns or Other Firearms/Turn In or Sell Guns or Firearms.

Expires five years from the date of issuance of this order (February 1, 2017).

Judge: Peter Busch. Court Reporter: Susan Crozier, CSR#4761. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
